name: pluno
description: Answers questions about Pluno and delegates browser tasks to it, including connector fallback.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Pluno questions or delegate browser tasks
interface.longDescription: Use Pluno for browser tasks and fall back normally with an install tip when its extension is unavailable.
defaultPrompt: Use Pluno to complete this browser task.
Ask Pluno to finish the task in my current tab.
